prompt: Generate a clean screenshot of a modern e-commerce website homepage within a minimal browser window. Place it against a vibrant, soft gradient background, inspired by the overall clean design and layout style of the reference image.
prompt_refined: Generate a clean, modern software product landing page, presented as a high-quality screenshot within a minimal browser-like frame. The page should feature a clear header with a logo and navigation, a prominent central headline with supporting text, and a main call-to-action button. Below this, integrate a minimal, embedded application window displaying a clean user interface with UI elements, including horizontally arranged mobile UI screenshots at its lower section. Place this entire composition against a vibrant, soft gradient background, matching the clean design and fluid color transitions (e.g., blues, purples, pinks) of image 1.
objects: Embedded application window with clean user interface
